Vocabulary - जनादरपात्रता कथम् ? | Story 13

28 Apr 2021 | Sanskrit Sanskrit-Stories Sanskrit-Vocabulary

Image from Telegram Channel - kathaaH कथाः

Meanings from - Learnsanskrit.cc

Sanskrit Word English Meaning
कुपित angry / offended
प्रतिवचन answer / reply
अदत्त्वा not having given
वृष्टि rain
यथा for instance / than [comparison]
इत्यतः due to that
आदौ initially

Few Sankrit Sentences

Sanskrit Sentence English Meaning
सा किञ्चित् कुपिता अस्ति she is a bit angry.
वानराः कुपिताः अभवन् the monkeys became angry
अहं तस्यै बहु कुपितवती I got really angry with her.
तस्मात् अहं बहु कुपिता आसम् It made me really angry.
   
सा अष्टवर्षीया इत्यतः सा न ज्ञास्यति She will not know. She is an eight-year-old child.

Note - All meanings are from the above mentioned website. If there is any mistake, do inform.
